ai-w10-t1.answer: Production AI integration: wrapper service, timeouts, retries, circuit breaker, structured logging. Same patterns as payment or email APIs.
ai-w10-t1.realWorld: AiClient interface + OpenAiImpl — swap provider without changing controllers.

ai-w10-t2.answer: springdoc-openapi generates Swagger from annotations. AI polishes @Operation descriptions — verify against real behavior.
ai-w10-t2.realWorld: Swagger UI at /swagger-ui.html — share with QA and frontend.

ai-w10-t3.answer: AI drafts Postman collection from OpenAPI. Import, add environment vars, write test scripts.
ai-w10-t3.realWorld: Collection in repo — new teammate imports and hits all endpoints in 5 minutes.

ai-w10-t4.answer: API docs need: auth instructions, error format, pagination, rate limits, examples. AI outlines; you fill truth.
ai-w10-t4.realWorld: README link to Swagger + sample curl for copy-paste.

ai-w10-t5.answer: Test APIs: happy path, validation errors, auth failure, edge payloads. AI lists cases; Newman runs in CI.
ai-w10-t5.realWorld: Contract tests catch breaking JSON field renames before mobile release.

ai-w10-t6.answer: AI reviews API for consistency: naming, status codes, error shape, versioning.
ai-w10-t6.realWorld: v1 and v2 different error JSON — AI flags; you standardize.

ai-w10-t7.answer: Prompt APIs expose templated AI calls to clients — hide raw provider keys server-side.
ai-w10-t7.realWorld: POST /api/summarize {text} — server calls OpenAI, returns summary.

ai-w10-t8.answer: Validate AI responses: JSON schema, max length, required fields before returning to client.
ai-w10-t8.realWorld: Jackson + @Valid on response DTO; reject malformed model output.

ai-w10-t9.answer: Log AI errors with correlation id, status, latency — not full prompts with PII. Alert on error rate spike.
ai-w10-t9.realWorld: OpenAI 503 → retry; sustained failures → circuit open, graceful degradation.

ai-w10-t10.answer: Optimize: cache identical prompts, smaller model for simple tasks, stream responses, batch where allowed.
ai-w10-t10.realWorld: FAQ answers cached 1 hour — same question, zero token cost.
